mobileVoiceNotice.title: Voice on Mobile
mobileVoiceNotice.message: Voice features work best on desktop. You can still use the keyboard to chat!

welcome.title: Welcome to Agora Cosmica
welcome.tagline: Explore a universe of wisdom through the voices of remarkable thinkers throughout history.
welcome.quote: Follow your bliss and the universe will open doors where there were only walls.

guides.title: Find Your Echo
guides.titleFull: Discover the Echo of Your Sage Mentor
guides.description: Explore 30 extraordinary minds across three wisdom traditions, each offering unique historical perspectives.

journey.title: Your Journey, Your Discovery
journey.description: Choose your path: Each offers a distinct window into ageless knowledge.

story.title: Story Mode
story.description: Narrative journeys introducing the sage's wisdom

wisdom.title: Star Seed Mode
wisdom.description: Deep wisdom exploration through structured conversations

freetalk.title: Freetalk Mode
freetalk.description: Open dialogue on any aspect of the sage's wisdom

quest.title: Quest Mode
quest.description: Challenges that test knowledge and illuminate your stars

conversation.title: Speak with the Echoes
conversation.description: Engage with historical figures using voice commands. Their wisdom comes alive through natural dialogue.

steps.speak: Speak naturally to the historical figure
steps.keyboard: Or tap keyboard icon for typing

constellation.title: Star Seeds & Cosmic Constellations
constellation.description: Discover and collect Star Seeds of wisdom to form unique cosmic constellations. Each figure's teachings are mapped in the stars.
